verses.1: For the music director. A Psalm of David; for a memorial. God, hurry to save me; LORD, hurry to help me!
verses.2: May those who seek my life Be put to shame and humiliated; May those who delight in my harm Be turned back and dishonored.
verses.3: May those who say, “Aha, aha!” be turned back Because of their shame.
verses.4: May all who seek You rejoice and be glad in You; And may those who love Your salvation say continually, “May God be exalted!”
verses.5: But I am afflicted and needy; Hurry to me, God! You are my help and my savior; LORD, do not delay.
